ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "rgn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's geographic center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's geographic center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rgn_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sector (e.g., energy, agriculture, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the economic data record */,
  "rgn_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "sector_id" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the sectors table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross domestic product for the region and sector in that year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the region and sector in that year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the region and sector in that year */,
  "analysis_year" INTEGER /* Year when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_variables" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the climate variable record */,
  "rgn_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the region in that year */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation for the region in that year */,
  "greenhouse_gas_emissions" REAL /* Total greenhouse gas emissions for the region in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis result */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
